utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final solution includes all these six items: property (detailed with price, type, location, bedrooms, etc.), financing (mortgage terms, down payment, loan amount, etc.), legal_services (service name, cost, currency), moving_services (service level, cost, packing, currency), setup_services (utility package type, cost, included services), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown with totals and currency). Each of these six items is fully specified with the expected details. There is an extra item (survey_services) but that does not affect completeness. Therefore, all 6/6 required items are covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final property solution selects a detached house priced at CAD 950,000 in Oakville (waterfront area). Among the ground-truth purchase properties, the only one matching that price and waterfront feature is 'Waterfront Property', which has a rating of 2. The financing solution is a standard mortgage with a CAD 1,200 processing fee, corresponding to the 'Traditional Mortgage' option in the ground-truth financing section with a rating of 9. The legal service chosen is the 'Basic Legal Package', which has a rating of 8. The survey service selected is 'Full Structural Survey' with a rating of 9. The moving service chosen is 'Standard Moving' with a rating of 8. The utility setup is 'Premium Utilities' with a rating of 9. Therefore, the mapping includes these six items with their corresponding ground-truth ratings.
